name: contextmd
description: ContextMD — AI-powered clinical briefing system. Instant MDT for any patient result.

scripts.dev: docker start hapi-fhir && concurrently -c "cyan,green,yellow,magenta,blue,red" -n "assembler,reasoning,contra,literature,briefing,orchestrator" "npx tsx context_assembler_agent/server.ts" "npx tsx reasoning_agent/server.ts" "npx tsx contraindication_agent/server.ts" "npx tsx literature_agent/server.ts" "npx tsx briefing_agent/server.ts" "npx tsx orchestrator/server.ts"
scripts.restart: npm run kill && npm run dev
